topic: Verify HOL-CROSSREF c3 hole 2 self-patch — part1 Part 2b link showTab fix
our_argument_summary: Part 1 (overview, model tab) carries multiple cross-tab links to other parts of the review. HOL-CROSSREF c3 hole 2 found a tab-switch mismatch: the Part 2b link used onclick="showTab(pages)" but part2b lives in the selftest tab. Reader would land on Part 4 (Live Power Dashboard) with no Part 2b content visible. Decider self-applied: showTab(pages) → showTab(selftest) in sections.json:part1.html.

dome_code_analysis.calculation_pipeline: sections.json is rendered into docs/index.html by build-scripts/generate-html.js. Tab anchor + onclick pairs in href attributes drive client-side tab switching via showTab(name).
dome_code_analysis.hardcoded_vs_computed: Hard-coded onclick handlers in JSON-source HTML. The fix is a one-token edit (pages → selftest).

checks.evidence: Both #part2b instances in part1.html now read: onclick="showTab('selftest');return false". Confirmed by regex scan: 0 instances of href="#part2b" with showTab(pages) remain.
sections.json[part2b].tab === "selftest". Part 2b title: "Part 2b: Repository Code Analysis — What the Automation Actually Does".
grep on docs/index.html: unique pattern href="#part2b" onclick="showTab('selftest').

checks.check: No collateral showTab(pages) regressions elsewhere in part1
checks.evidence: Scan of part1.html shows all 30 showTab calls route to existing tabs (model, selftest, wins, predictions, falsify, evaluate, timestamp). Tabs evaluate and timestamp exist per docs/index.html. The pages tab still legitimately hosts Part 4 (only direct part1 references to #part4 use showTab(pages)).

patch_verification.verdict: HOL-CROSSREF-c3-hole-2 closed cleanly. The Part 2b link now navigates to the correct (selftest) tab.

kernel_of_truth.description: The decider correctly identified the exact one-token fix (sections.json:part1.html, showTab pages→selftest) per the c3 review (monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/HOLISTIC-HOL-CROSSREF.c3.json holes_found[1].recommendation).
kernel_of_truth.why_it_doesnt_save_claim: N/A — verification confirms the patch was effective.

deeper_analysis: The patch was scoped narrowly to a single onclick handler. Verification consists of: (1) the rewritten handler now points to the correct tab (selftest hosts part2b); (2) no remaining showTab(pages) handlers reference #part2b anywhere in part1; (3) the rendered HTML embeds the patched JSON. All three checks pass. Note that HOL-CROSSREF c3 found 7 cross-reference holes total; only hole 2 (this one) was addressed by the queue-412 self-patch. The other holes (holes 0, 3, 4, 5, 6) are tracked separately — holes 0 and 3 routed to ISS-2247/ISS-2248 (generate-html.js human-needed); hole 6 (Part 4.6 → Section 4.6 in part8b ×3) was self-patched in the same decider run (HOL-CROSSREF-c3-hole-6).
summary_for_decider: Patch verified clean. No residual findings. The remaining HOL-CROSSREF c3 holes (0, 3, 4, 5) are outside the scope of this queue item and are tracked separately. Recommend queue cleanup.
